title: Workspace One Intelligent Hub - App catalog
body: To access the application catalog from the Intelligent Hub you can click the icon in the system tray (top right). Or, you can open it from the Applications folder by selecting Go - Applications. Click on Workspace ONE Intelligent Hub Once you are in the Intelligent Hub Apps window, click "All Apps" to see the full list of available software, or enter the name in the Search field. Find the desired application, click the INSTALL or REINSTALL button.
